name: AI Customer Support Automation (Groq — Free) copy

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "ticket_id": "{{ $json.ticket_id }}",
  "status": "escalated",
  "message": "Your request has been escalated to our support team. A specialist will contact you shortly.",
  "urgency": "{{ $json.classification.urgency }}",
  "estimated_response": "{{ $json.classification.urgency === 'critical' ? '15 minutes' : $json.classification.urgency === 'high' ? '2 hours' : '24 hours' }}"
}
